{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318524566F49A8A17BBFF051122"}"},"total":4813},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558545420576113432","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从短剧那过来的，矛盾冲突太多了。看了原著小说发现还是小说好看剧情吸引人，是我目前看到最好看的科举文，比其他的秀才华秀诗的爽文来说这本书的男主更稳扎稳打，很符合穿越者普通人的实际情况，并且男主的家里人太逗了，我一会哭一会笑，剧情没有落入俗套。
天杀的我花了一天的时间全看完了才发现还在更新，男主还没考上状元，作者敢不敢更快点啊","text_exts":[{"e":85,"s":82,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263165FF051122%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227558545420576113432%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227532403250494966808%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759864641,"group_id":"7532403250494966808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwFV+6/rR6kiKibB3O/v31pDTGPfIDp2zt+uEBTlFjZg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/be40bd321c054f5387281c2c82419d90~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787423&x-signature=k77fDY0y8v%2Bi8fumSVj6VznKBvk%3D","user_id":"3342936255511664","user_name":"kuioral"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3342936255511664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532403250494966808","book_info":{"abstract":"王屠夫家满门壮汉，个个人高马大，膘肥体壮，活脱脱一窝黑熊精转世！偏偏小儿子王三牛是个异类——瘦弱、清秀、风吹就倒，站一起像只误入熊窝的小狐狸。
杀猪？猪血兜头浇下，他先晕了！种地？锄头比他人都高！眼看在家快成“废人”，老娘含泪拍板：“儿啊，你这样子只能去科举给自己挣条路了！”
王三牛：我太难了！穿越成病秧子，还被全家大力怪包围！杀不了猪，种不了地？行吧，只能勉为其难去科举了。
谁料想，童生、秀才、举人、进士……一路过关斩将！从七品县令到工部尚书，他硬是用笔杆子杀出了一条通天路！
金銮殿上，新晋尚书王大人轻抚腰间祖传杀猪刀，微微一笑：
“诸位同僚，寒门屠户之子在此！若想文辩，本官奉陪；若想武斗……此刀饮过千猪之血，也不介意多斩几个聒噪之人。”
满朝朱紫，汗透官袍!","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/039e2241f4d6dd4f33cfd33f67eaa9aa","author":"Diki粑粑","author_id":"","book_id":"7532403250494966808","book_name":"科举：杀猪世家，出了个文曲星","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8e0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"26.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532504812114428478","read_count":"263510","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1624629"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"682","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c79bb0025363dcdc4f63b57b1554b542~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447165&x-signature=KjnToeji9zwYTxkywpi5o%2FPnGhw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3955148668","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"217"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318524566F49A8A17BBFF051122"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":44,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":32537,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":70205},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542121517272056638","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者的文笔很流畅，文采好，美食那部分写的可好了，看着就让人馋（作者可以考虑开一个美食文）非常能让我代入，想法也好，很有创新，尤其是那个诗词积累本，太好玩了。这本是我看过的科举文里能排到前面的。我很喜欢里面的人设，尤其是家庭和同窗，写得很温馨，看着就暖暖的。希望作者一定坚持下去，不要断更，最好多多更新！！（ps：求作者主角一定要六元及第啊，我都看小说了，就是要爽爽的[害羞]）","text_exts":[{"e":126,"s":124,"text":"暖暖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774263165FF051122%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227542121517272056638%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227532403250494966808%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756041183,"group_id":"7532403250494966808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzsRw91axBTgtiA23P2CwmiVhC9ZTMvmrnlQVzpHUATn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/634b0d06bb82470d8d594bfdd0f12eb5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789859&x-signature=yRzj8cI9KqQM3p9T8cJx8H3v%2FCQ%3D","user_id":"1236307218276782","user_name":"大力卷心菜zzzj"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1236307218276782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532403250494966808","book_info":{"abstract":"王屠夫家满门壮汉，个
